title: polystichum harpophyllum
intro: Polystichum harpophyllum, also known as the Hound's Tongue Fern, is a species of fern native to Asia and the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Polystichum harpophyllum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, often combined with other herbs in traditional herbal remedies, and is also used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
